content:
What are the IRAP Innovation Eligibility Requirements?

{/* Company Eligibility */}
Company Eligibility Criteria

✅ Essential Requirements

  • • Canadian incorporated for-profit business
  • • Fewer than 500 employees worldwide
  • • Financially stable with adequate cash flow
  • • Demonstrated innovation capacity
  • • Strong potential for commercial growth
  • • Commitment to R&D and innovation

🎯 Business Characteristics

  • • Technology-based or innovation-focused
  • • Established business operations (not startups)
  • • Clear competitive advantages
  • • Export potential or national market focus
  • • Management commitment to innovation
{/* Project Eligibility */}
Innovation Project Eligibility

✅ Eligible Project Types

  • • Technology development with technical uncertainty
  • • New product or service development
  • • Significant process improvements
  • • Technology adaptation and enhancement
  • • Prototype development and testing
  • • Pre-commercial technology validation

🚫 Non-Eligible Activities

  • • Routine engineering or quality control
  • • Market research and business planning
  • • Commercial production activities
  • • General business operations
  • • Activities without technical risk
shortAnswer: Yes — Complete guide to IRAP innovation funding from National Research Council Canada. Get 60-80% R&D funding up to $500K with dedicated Industrial Technology Advisors for SMEs. Funding available: up to $500K.
shortAnswerQuestion: What innovation and technology grants are available in 2026?

faq.question: What is the application deadline for IRAP Industrial Research Assistance Program  | Up to  Innovation Funding for SMEs in 2026?
faq.answer: Deadlines typically vary by specific program tier. However, for 2026, many initiatives operate on a rolling intake basis until funds are depleted. Check the official portal for specific cutoffs.

faq.question: How much funding can I get through IRAP Industrial Research Assistance Program  | Up to  Innovation Funding for SMEs?
faq.answer: Funding amounts range depending on business size and scope. Top awards can reach $500K.

faq.question: Do I have to give up equity for this program?
faq.answer: No. Government grants and subsidies are non-dilutive, meaning you retain 100% ownership of your company.

expertTip.title: ITA Nomination Required
expertTip.content: You cannot apply for IRAP without an Industrial Technology Advisor (ITA) nomination. Build a relationship with an ITA months before you need the funding.
